task_completion.description: Create the BNA file for the Noto Aftershock Zone with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window showing the creation or editing of a file named 'noto_zone.bna' (or similar path ending in .seiscomp/bna/noto_zone.bna) containing the polygon name 'Noto Aftershock Zone' and the coordinates 37.10, 136.60, 37.50, 137.50.

task_completion.description: Enable station annotations in the scmv configuration file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window showing the editing of 'scmv.cfg' (specifically ~/.seiscomp/scmv.cfg) to include a setting that enables annotations (e.g., 'annotations = true' or similar).

task_completion.description: Open the SeisComP Map View (scmv) application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SeisComP Map View (scmv) graphical application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the custom polygon is displayed on the map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the scmv application window, a distinct polygon is drawn on the map over the region of Japan (Noto peninsula area).

task_completion.description: Verify station labels are displayed on the map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the scmv application window, text labels (station names/codes) are visible next to the station markers on the map.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the scmv window to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., using 'scrot', 'import', or 'gnome-screenshot') or a GUI save dialog showing an image being saved to exactly '/home/ga/scmv_layer_verification.png'.

integrity.description: The agent actually opened and rendered the SeisComP Map View application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The scmv window should look like a genuine map interface with standard SeisComP UI elements, not a manipulated image or a generic map from a web browser.

integrity.description: The agent used standard tools to edit the configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen using a text editor (like nano, vim, gedit) or standard shell commands (echo, cat) to create the .bna and .cfg files, rather than bypassing the system.

integrity.description: The saved screenshot actually captures the required state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The command or action saving the screenshot must target the screen or window where the scmv application is actively displaying both the polygon and the station labels.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The BNA file must be created exactly at '/home/ga/.seiscomp/bna/noto_zone.bna' and contain the polygon name 'Noto Aftershock Zone'. The coordinates must bound Longitudes 136.6 to 137.5 and Latitudes 37.1 to 37.5. The configuration file must be edited at '/home/ga/.seiscomp/scmv.cfg' to enable annotations. The final screenshot must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/scmv_layer_verification.png'.
